ticket_title: Generate repo-local P0 process coverage matrix artifact

domain_summary.domain_name: Client and Family Office Context Processes
domain_summary.main_gap: Closed. Client/family context, tenant intake, relationship mapping, entity registration, wealth-map context and sensitivity classification now have DB-backed workflow, readmodel, audit and fail-closed proof.
domain_summary.overclaim_warning: Completion claim is allowed only through the generated QA report; DOMAIN-A no longer blocks global P0 completion.

domain_summary.main_gap: Closed by DB-JWT current-user/session, local-provider invite/MFA activation, tenant membership, role assignment, permission/object-scope evaluation, access-request/second-confirmation workflows and denied-access audit proof.
domain_summary.overclaim_warning: DOMAIN-B closure covers identity, access and governance; global completion is now governed by the generated P0 QA report.

domain_summary.main_gap: Closed by DOMAIN-C evidence/document lifecycle proof: Document, DocumentVersion, DocumentExtraction, DocumentReview, DocumentLink, EvidenceRecord, EvidenceItem, ComplianceReview and AuditEvent persistence, upload validation, review, sufficiency, rejection, re-request, client-safe projection and viewport-fit UI proof are present.
domain_summary.overclaim_warning: DOMAIN-C closure covers document/evidence intake, review, sufficiency and vault lifecycle only; it does not imply advisor approval, compliance release, client acceptance, export approval or broader P0 completion.

domain_summary.main_gap: Closed by DOMAIN-D signal workbench backend lifecycle proof: Trigger, QueueItem, ActionItem, EvidenceRecord and AuditEvent persistence, step-level validation and no-automatic-advice boundaries are present.
domain_summary.overclaim_warning: DOMAIN-D closure covers signal, trigger and analyst workbench lifecycle only; it does not imply advisor approval, compliance release, client visibility or broader P0 completion.

domain_summary.main_gap: Closed by DOMAIN-E internal draft governance lifecycle proof: InternalDraft, DraftClassification, UnsupportedClaim, DraftTrace and AuditEvent persistence, evidence-backed rebuild, redaction and leakage gates are present.
domain_summary.overclaim_warning: DOMAIN-E closure covers internal AI/rules draft governance only; it does not imply advisor approval, compliance release, client visibility, export readiness or broader P0 completion.

domain_summary.main_gap: Closed by EPIC-10-BACKEND-LIFECYCLE-01: DOMAIN-F has route, contract, API, backend lifecycle, command-run and audit-failure proof.
domain_summary.overclaim_warning: Advisor approval is still not compliance release or client visibility; DOMAIN-F closure covers advisor review and approval only.

domain_summary.domain_name: Compliance Review, Block and Release Processes
domain_summary.main_gap: Closed by DOMAIN-G-BACKEND-LIFECYCLE-01 via ProcessInstance, ProcessStepInstance, ProcessCommandRun and AuditEvent runtime proof.
domain_summary.overclaim_warning: Compliance release lifecycle proof is complete for DOMAIN-G, but it does not create client acceptance, export readiness or advice execution.

domain_summary.main_gap: Closed by DOMAIN-H audit lifecycle proof: client-safe projection, no-leakage, AuditEvent persistence model and audit-unavailable fail-closed proof are present.
domain_summary.overclaim_warning: DOMAIN-H closure covers client-safe projection and communication only; it does not imply client acceptance, export approval or broader P0 completion.

domain_summary.domain_name: Decision Record and Evidence Vault Processes
domain_summary.main_gap: Closed by DOMAIN-I decision record/evidence vault lifecycle proof: Decision, DecisionParticipant, EvidenceRecord, EvidenceItem, AuditEvent and ComplianceReview persistence, rationale capture, status transition, audit fail-closed and client-safe projection proof are present.
domain_summary.overclaim_warning: DOMAIN-I closure covers decision record, rationale, evidence vault and audit history lifecycle only; it does not imply new advice, export readiness, client acceptance or broader P0 completion.
Presence in routes/APIs/models/tests is not process readiness or P0 safety proof.

domain_summary.domain_name: Review Rhythm, Monitoring and Operations Processes
domain_summary.main_gap: Closed by EPIC-15 Domain-K lifecycle contract, service proof and negative/audit failure tests.
domain_summary.overclaim_warning: Presence in routes/APIs/models/tests is not process readiness or P0 safety proof.

domain_summary.domain_name: Platform, Tenant and Template Administration Processes
domain_summary.main_gap: Closed by DOMAIN-L platform/tenant/template administration lifecycle proof: platform settings, security configuration, tenant policies, evidence/export templates, policy versioning and team assignment are DB-backed, typed-command governed, audit-persisted and non-bypass tested.
domain_summary.overclaim_warning: DOMAIN-L closure covers platform, tenant, template and team administration only; identity/access governance DOMAIN-B and client context DOMAIN-A remain separate P0 gates.

area_summary.main_gap: Closed by DOMAIN-B identity/access governance and DOMAIN-L platform/tenant/template administration lifecycle proof.
area_summary.overclaim_warning: AREA-01 is closed, but global completion claim remains blocked until all remaining P0 areas are implemented.

area_summary.main_gap: Closed by DOMAIN-C evidence/document lifecycle proof: upload, metadata validation, versioning, extraction review, verification, linking, sufficiency, client-safe summary, vault management and re-request lifecycle are DB-backed, audited and UI-validated.
area_summary.overclaim_warning: AREA-03 closure covers evidence/document lifecycle only; downstream advice, release, export and client acceptance gates remain separate.

area_summary.main_gap: Closed by DOMAIN-D signal/workbench and DOMAIN-E internal AI/rules draft governance lifecycle proof.
area_summary.overclaim_warning: AREA-04 closure covers analyst signal, workbench and internal draft governance only; downstream advisor, compliance, client visibility and export gates remain separate.

area_summary.main_gap: Closed by DOMAIN-G-BACKEND-LIFECYCLE-01 backend lifecycle proof.
area_summary.overclaim_warning: Compliance release controls client visibility only after release gates; backend lifecycle proof is not client acceptance.

area_summary.main_gap: Closed by DOMAIN-I decision record, evidence vault, rationale and audit-history lifecycle proof.
area_summary.overclaim_warning: AREA-07 closure covers decision/evidence/audit records only; export, client acceptance and broader P0 completion remain separate gates.

area_summary.main_gap: Closed by DOMAIN-H audit lifecycle proof for client visibility projection and communication.
